title: calamagrostis pseudophragmites subsp. tartarica
intro: Calamagrostis pseudophragmites subsp. tartarica, also known as Tartarian grass or Calamagrostis pseudophragmites subsp. tartarica, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calamagrostis pseudophragmites subsp. tartarica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems.
